patterns.name: Back-rank mate
patterns.description: A rook or queen mates a king trapped on its back rank behind its own pawns.

patterns.name: Mate on f7
patterns.description: The queen, supported by a bishop, mates on the weak f7 square (the scholar's-mate idea).

patterns.name: Smothered mate
patterns.description: A knight mates a king that is hemmed in by its own pieces.

patterns.name: King-and-queen mate
patterns.description: The queen mates on the edge while the king covers the escape squares.
